test_cases.name: Multiple independent tasks — parallel dispatch
test_cases.input: Create 3 reference files for the deep-research skill in parallel

test_cases.name: Single task — should NOT trigger
test_cases.input: Fix the typo in SKILL.md line 42
assertions: Skill does NOT trigger on single task
Agent executes directly without coordination overhead

test_cases.name: Shared state tasks — sequential mode
test_cases.input: Update the SKILL.md and then update its reference files to match

test_cases.name: Envelope validation blocks dispatch
test_cases.input: Dispatch an agent to write a skill
assertions: Blocks if any of 5 sections missing

test_cases.name: Ralph-loop re-dispatch on failure
test_cases.input: Fix the validation errors in the skill
assertions: On FAIL: reads report, fixes, re-dispatches
